name: Sichuan Zhongguang Lightning Protection Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Zhongguang Lightning Protection Technologies Co., Ltd. provides various professional lightning protection solutions in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It offers lighting road, earthing products; and box type, power, signal, antenna feeder, combined, and smart SDP products, as well as provides lightning warning and monitoring systems. Its products are used in communication, buildings, wind power, photovoltaic, and LED luminaries sectors. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.
